items.title: Microsoft, like, totally gets why students are booing AI-pilled graduation speakers
items.summary: New college graduates around the country have been booing and heckling commencement speakers who hype up AI. Microsoft would like everyone to talk it out. In a blog post running...

items.title: After Belfast riots, UK reminds social platforms they're obligated to remove hateful content
